notes.title: How to Build a Second Brain
notes.content: Tiago Forte's method for organizing digital information using the PARA system: Projects, Areas, Resources, Archives.
notes.author: Tiago Forte

notes.title: The Feynman Technique
notes.content: Learn anything by explaining it simply. Four steps: choose a concept, teach it to a child, identify gaps, simplify and use analogies.
notes.author: Richard Feynman

notes.title: Obsidian Graph View Tips
notes.content: Use tags consistently, create MOCs (Maps of Content), link liberally between notes. The graph becomes useful after 200+ notes.
